title: Bridge Essay: EEG Signatures and Effects of Mindfulness Approaches in Adolescents With Nonsuic

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through EEG, Signatures, and, Effects, of.

**EEG Signatures and Effects of Mindfulness Approaches in Adolescents With Nonsuicidal Self-Injury.** — Psychophysiology. PMID: 40491012. DOI: 10.1111/psyp.70085. Nonsuicidal self-injury (NSSI) is arecurring behavior most prevalent among adolescents in which one intentionally harms one'stissues and organs without the intent of death, which has acomplex pathophysiology and lacks established interventions. As NSSI has been linked to deficits in cognitive control, mindfulness training that enhances this process may be beneficial.
